reason: Both changed files are reformats and reference-documentation additions that surface no new API methods, parameter names, return types, or behavior changes relative to the pre-commit state of the docs. All SDK methods, the from_dict factory pattern, and dict-style VeltSelfHostingResponse format were present in the prior commit. The data-models.mdx additions formally document field-level types for pre-existing request/response dataclasses but do not introduce new SDK surface. The discrepancy between skill-rule attribute-style response access (response.error_code) and the documented dict-style (result['errorCode']) predates this commit and is therefore not a delta introduced by it.

filesRead: git show 8410e1c1:backend-sdks/python.mdx (full structure scan, method listing)
git show HEAD~1:backend-sdks/python.mdx (pre-commit structure scan for comparison)
git show 8410e1c1:api-reference/sdk/models/data-models.mdx (Python SDK Types section listing)

findingsPerArea.backend-sdks/python.mdx: Pure reformat. All 40+ methods in sdk.api.* and all 9 methods in sdk.selfHosting.* existed pre-commit (verified via git show HEAD~1 method listing). The from_dict factory pattern was already present in pre-commit framework examples. Per-method Params/Returns links are new presentation only — no API surface change.
findingsPerArea.api-reference/sdk/models/data-models.mdx: Added ~100 Python type definitions (request/response dataclasses with field-level type, required, and description columns). These formally document pre-existing dataclasses. VeltSelfHostingResponse dict-style format (statusCode, errorCode) was already documented in python.mdx pre-commit via inline response blocks.
findingsPerArea.from_dict pattern: Present in both pre- and post-commit python.mdx. Existing skill rules use constructor-style — that discrepancy predates this commit and is not a new delta.
findingsPerArea.VeltSelfHostingResponse format: Dict-style with camelCase keys (statusCode, errorCode) was already in python.mdx pre-commit. Existing skill rules use attribute-style (response.error_code) — discrepancy predates this commit.
findingsPerArea.rewriter askAi: Listed in pre-commit service table and fully documented pre-commit. Skill rule lists it in service table only, without method detail — but this gap predates this commit.
findingsPerArea.accessControl methods: All 5 methods (addPermissions, getPermissions, removePermissions, generateSignature, generateToken) present pre-commit.
findingsPerArea.gdpr / workspace / token services: All methods present pre-commit. No new surface.

skippedItems: .claude/logs/*.json and pipeline .md files — pipeline artifacts, not docs content
